verdict.summary: GENUINE K-level non-contrived case: XY4 (production memory DD) makes a Z-drift blind to FULL tomography (control-fixable, NOT readout-fixable); modifying the DD exposes it at finite N* under realistic noise, trading 1/f-noise protection (DD suppresses correlated noise; it does NOT help vs Markovian T1/T2, which is why detection N* uses the Lindblad model and protection uses the 1/f filter function). PDET's classical kernel flags the blind direction for free.
